The All-New Nissan Gravite
  • Request A call Back
  • CNG Saving Calculator

The All-New Nissan Gravite is now equipped with a segment-first twin cylinder CNG kit, engineered to deliver superior fuel efficiency of up to 24km/kg through intelligent design. This innovation ensures ample 3rd row space, ensuring that your family's journeys are shared exactly as they should be.

T&C Apply

THE ALL-NEW NISSAN GRAVITE LAUNCH EDITION WITH EXCITING FEATURES^

                

Dual Dash Cam

It records both front and rear views, adding an extra layer of confidence on every drive.

JBL Speakers.

Sound that fills the journey. Rich audio quality enhances everyday drives and long road trips alike.

Air purifier

Available in the Launch Edition, the Air Purifier continuously cleans cabin air to reduce dust and pollutants for a fresher journey.

Wireless Charging

Effortless, cable-free power and a clutter-free cabin for your everyday drives.

PROTECTIVE C-SHAPED AERO ACCENTS

It enhances durability and are built for everyday Indian road conditions.

SIGNATURE DESIGN DECAL

The decals add a bold, sporty edge that makes the car stand apart instantly.

THE NEW CLASS OF PREMIUMNESS AND COMFORT

Gravite is designed for evolving plans and shared journeys. Spacious seating, smart comfort features and thoughtful storage ensure the cabin adapts effortlessly, whether it’s a daily commute, a family outing or a long highway drive. The Gravite sports interiors that feel and look refined.

  • Download brochure
  • Configure Gravite

                          

PLUSH Suede & Leatherette Seats

Comfort that feels indulgent, even on long journeys.

Dual Tone Dashboard with Wooden Finish

A cabin that reflects warmth and enhancesdriving experience. 

Tropicalised AC with 3-Row Vents

Comfort for everyone, front to back.

Generous Knee Room & Head Room (2nd & 3rd Row)

Roominess that keeps long journeys relaxed.

Multiple Cooled Compartments

Keeps refreshments cool on the go.

THE NEW CLASS OF VERSATILITY

Gravite’s multiple modular configurations ensure everyone fits in, including people, luggage and evolving needs. With multiple seating and cargo configurations, the cabin reshapes itself around your life, making it practical, comfortable and genuinely usable for every kind of journey.**

THE NEW CLASS OF INTUITIVE TECHNOLOGY

Gravite’s technology is engineered to simplify every drive. Digital displays & smart interfaces keep essential information visible and controls intuitive. Everything works together to support the driver seamlessly.

Floating 20.32 cm Touchscreen Infotainment

Wireless access to navigation & entertainment with Android Auto™ & Apple CarPlay®.

Rain-Sensing Wipers

Automatically adapts to changing weather conditions.

17.78 cm Fully Digital Instrument Cluster with TPMS

Clear, real-time information that keeps you confidently informed.

THE NEW CLASS OF ROAD PRESENCE

Gravite’s stance, ground clearance, striking proportions as well as looks give it an unmistakable road presence, no matter the geography it’s driven to.

                

PIANO BLACK 2D GRILLE WITH AERO ACCENTS

A bold front signature that announces presence instantly.

High Ground Clearance & Bold Dual Tone R15 Flex Wheels

Built to handle uneven roads and designed to balance style with everyday practicality.

Signature LED Headlamp with integrated LED DRLs

Sharper illumination that enhances both safety and style.

Crystal Edge LED Tail Lamps

Sculpted split LED tail lamps for strong road presence.

THE NEW CLASS OF ALL-ROUND SAFETY

Safety is at the Gravite's core. A combination of 30+ standard active and passive safety features, including 6 Airbags, ESC, TCS, HSA, ABS, EBD and more, protects everyone on board.

                            

6 Airbags (Standard)

All-around protection for everyone who journeys with you.

Front & Rear Parking Sensors

Navigate confidently and with ease in tight spaces.

Hill Start Assist (HSA)

Enjoy stress-free starts and confident control on inclines and flyovers.

Electronic Stability Control (ESC)

Maintain vehicle control during sudden maneuvers, cornering, or on slippery surfaces.

Traction Control System (TCS)

Supports stable driving across changing road conditions.

THE NEW CLASS OF CARE - NISSAN SERVICE PROMISE

Gravite focuses on long-term ownership confidence, not just the purchase moment. With extended warranties, pre-paid maintenance plans & support services, economy here means fewer surprises and lower stress.

                          

Extended Warranty up to 10 Years / 2 00 000 km^^

Protection that stays with you for the long run.

5-Year / 50 000 km Pre-Paid Maintenance Plan

Worry-free servicing from day one.

3 Years 24x7 Roadside Assistance (RSA)

Help is always within reach, wherever you go.

**With 3rd Row removed (50:50 Seat split standard feature). With 3rd row-1 seat removed.

^^Standard warranty of 3 years or 100K kms whichever comes earlier and can be extended to 10 years or 200K kms on additional cost. Android Auto™ and Apple CarPlay® are registered trademark.

Please consult an authorised Nissan dealer for latest information on features/specifications before deciding to place an order.
